lore.english:
Ex UFS mercenary. Her parents were killed by demons when she was young, and she was tortured by having her eye dug out of its socket. However, she was saved by a  UFS soldier. She had no one to rely on,  so she grew up in an orphanage. Although she graduated from an academy of the  UFS, she didn't join the army. Instead, she became a lonely hunter who makes a living by hunting demons. The UFS recognized her skills as a demon hunter, and now she collaborates with them, receiving supplies for her missions.

It is said that she has the eye of a demon implanted in her right eye, that she wears an eye patch on, and most of the time, her weapons use the power of the eye as the source of power.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Wild Fire[-]
skills.description:
Fires dual pistols and attacks the enemy 5 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:460102]%)[-] [&HealRateDown] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:460102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:460102] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:
Fires dual pistols and attacks the enemy 5 times.
Target hit is inflicted with ([V3:460102]%) [&HealRateDown] at a [R:460102]% chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:460102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Support Drone[-]
skills.description:
Summons a drone over the enemy's head, which fires a laser beam that attacks 7 times.
Increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan][V3:460202]%[-] of the character's SPD.
Increases the turns of all [&DeBuff] the target has by [V2:460203] turns on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast]

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Full Burst[-]
skills.description:
Fires a powerful laser beam towards an enemy with the drone.
On [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:460302]%)[-][&Bleeding], [&Burn], and [&Poison] [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Akimbo Pistols Hunter[-]
skills.description: If only one target is remaning, performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:460401]%)[-] [&Common_Word_Skill_DefPenetrate] attack.
